reviews.comment:

Good service, the downside is that at night it's difficult to pay by card, they only accept cash.

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, el playero acomodando a los clientes que estábamos haciendo fila para cargar Nafta, en la administración nos atendieron rápido y dejamos estacionado el auto en el estacionamiento mientras hicimos compras.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, the attendant accommodated the customers who were queuing to fill up with gas, the administration attended to us quickly and we left the car parked in the parking lot while we did some shopping.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRcnMzcDZRRRAB
